/usr/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/InformationBoard.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/InformationBoard.dir/InformationBoard_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/InformationBoard.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/InformationBoard.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/InformationBoard.dir/boardwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/InformationBoard.dir/ApiWeather/mainWeather.cpp.o CMakeFiles/InformationBoard.dir/ApiWeather/WeatherParameters.cpp.o CMakeFiles/InformationBoard.dir/ApiWeather/Searchers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/InformationBoard.dir/draggableelement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/InformationBoard.dir/boarddesignerwidget.cpp.o -o InformationBoard  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
